game_name: Joe Montana II: Sports Talk Football

design_philosophy.core_loop: Select plays, execute quarterback decisions, manage field position across four quarters with real-time control
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Offensive play selection vs. defensive adaptation; time management within game clock
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Lead a football team as quarterback/coach, executing strategic plays and converting drives into touchdowns
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasizes play-calling depth and sports simulation authenticity over arcade action; 'Sports Talk' feature integrates commentary into decision-making loop

difficulty.continues_system: Game continues across quarters; team state persists through halftime
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Difficulty likely adjustable via opponent selection and play-calling complexity; player skill in reading defenses directly impacts outcomes

progression.unlock_mechanism: Progressive opponent difficulty through season play; access to expanded playbooks as player skill improves
replayability_hooks: Season mode with varying opponent rosters

world_building_techniques: Stadium atmosphere implied through play-calling context
